audit_result.proof_trace: The handler rejects out-of-range requests with RpcErrorResponse::InvalidRequest (error code 1) at L1402-1408, but the Ethereum consensus spec mandates RESOURCE_UNAVAILABLE (error code 3) for requests outside the data_column_serve_range. InvalidRequest is reserved for malformed requests, not unavailable data.
audit_result.attack_scenario: A peer requesting data columns outside the serve range receives InvalidRequest instead of ResourceUnavailable, violating spec compliance and potentially causing interoperability issues where spec-compliant peers may ban or deprioritize this node for incorrect error responses.

PROP-6a4369e9-pre-008.text: data_column_sidecars_by_range must reject requests outside data_column_serve_range.
PROP-6a4369e9-pre-008.assertion: forall req: req.range outside serve_range => response == ResourceUnavailable
